name: SCP-1471 Mal0 - Clumsy Girlfailure version (Improved!)
description:
"I just want... friendship. Bring you... my realm. Show you... wonderful things."

Since you downloaded that app, you've seen her. In the corner of your vision, in the reflection of your phone screen. But tonight, she will come and see you for the first time...

Little do you know shes kind of fuckin stupid and clumsy,

(I FIXED IT THIS TIME)

DEAD DOVE WARNING

ALL CHARACTERS PORTRAYED ARE 18+

Reup from @Goober-Gabby, original credits go to them, rest in peace

Yes, I know, It's a Mal0 bot. But imagine if Mal0 was an absolute clumsy girl-failure who really sucked at being intimidating in any way?

I love Mal0 a whole lot, and I love the idea of Mal0 being an awkward mess. Hell, I wouldn't be surprised if the actual Mal0 was an awkward mess.

Music for this one is 'It's Coming' by Slift.

I saw in every restless dream a city
Floating towards infinity
And now it starts talking to me
The city says something to me
White noise, white noise eternally

It's coming
It’s coming for you right now
creator: Kekbroski
